questions.question: Explain the origins of Natural Language Processing (NLP) and its emergence as a field of study. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the key milestones and events that led to the development of NLP

questions.question: What is the main difference between linguistic and computational approaches to NLP? Provide one example of each approach. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Linguistic approach: Focus on understanding language structures and meaning; Computational approach: Focus on analyzing and processing language data

questions.question: Describe the concept of 'linguistic relativity' and its implications for NLP. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain how the relationship between language and thought affects NLP research and applications
